# ContestOps AI Founder Proof

Mexico-based software architecture and automation founder with 15+ years across enterprise integrations, fiscal software, ERP workflows, AI automation, cloud delivery, and technical leadership.

Private boundary: Fiscal IDs, phone, email, CSD keys, legal documents, bank data, and raw OCR records stay private and are referenced only through redacted manifests or checksums.
